research_series.series_name: Self-Report vs Objective Performance,Fatigue,Brain Fog,Sleepiness,and Functional Inference

patterns.pattern_name: Subjective symptoms often discordant from objective impairment

guardrails: Do not infer objective cognitive impairment from brain fog alone
Objective normal tests do not invalidate symptoms
Subjective and objective measures predict different outcomes
Performance validity context may be needed in clinical settings

summary.overall_assessment: Use self-report as lived-experience/function signal, not as direct proxy for objective impairment.
